publicFooter.desc: Next-generation educational operating system. Fast, secure, curriculum-bound, and fully optimized for school excellence.

publicHome.heroTitle: Smart School ERP Platform for modern education
publicHome.heroDesc: EDUCORE-OMEGA organizes and automates all operations of your academic institution. Real-time attendance, online fee collections, grade sheets, dynamic scheduling, and interactive portal portals.
publicHome.attendanceDesc: Multi-level attendance logs covering class sessions, periods, statuses, notifications for parents, and automatic low-attendance flags.
publicHome.feesDesc: Safe, online payments for school fees, with outstanding dues tracking, automated invoice generation, and instant receipt downloads.
publicHome.analyticsDesc: Dynamic visual charts, timetables, and audit logs tracking admin, teacher, student and parent portal operations.

publicFeatures.title: Complete Features List
publicFeatures.desc: Discover how EDUCORE-OMEGA can modernize your educational governance and student success tracking.
publicFeatures.attendanceDesc: Includes 10 attendance statuses, bulk recording, copy-yesterday shortcuts, risk logs, and automated alerts for students with low attendance rate.
publicFeatures.financeDesc: Automates student invoicing, accepts secure online Razorpay payment collections, tracks cash receipt ledgers, and logs full transaction histories.
publicFeatures.timetableDesc: Timetable builders supporting custom periods, subjects, assigned teacher lookup, physical activity slots, and published schedule integration.
publicFeatures.examsDesc: Create examinations, log subject marks, compute grade cards, rank students, lock/publish results, and analyze class averages instantly.
publicFeatures.portalsDesc: Integrated distinct layout views customized for Administrators, Teachers, Students, and Parents keeping everyone aligned.
publicFeatures.securityDesc: Robust identity management with custom schema security constraints, password strength policies, audit logging, and Supabase RLS security.

publicPricing.title: Pricing Packages
publicPricing.desc: Choose the plan that matches your institutional scale. Every package is fully secured and localized.
publicPricing.basicDesc: Perfect for small private and preschool academies needing essential digital tools.
publicPricing.proDesc: Best fit for growing schools needing advanced finance features and analytics.
publicPricing.entDesc: Complete institutional operating system for universities and large educational districts.

publicAbout.title: Our Mission & Vision
publicAbout.sec1Text: Founded with the mission to modernize institutional operations, EDUCORE-OMEGA is built to provide an educational operating system that keeps teachers, student records, finance ledgers, and parents coordinated.
publicAbout.sec1Text2: We believe that modern educational institutions deserve custom tools that are secure, localized in local languages, and highly performant on both mobile and desktop views.
publicAbout.visionDesc: To empower every academic institution with data-driven workflows, ensuring student success and governance transparency.
publicAbout.governanceDesc: Enterprise-grade security, fully adhering to Supabase Row Level Security standards, data privacy protection, and zero compliance compromise.

publicContact.title: Contact Support & Sales
publicContact.desc: Want a custom demo for your school district, or need onboarding assistance? Drop us a message, and our team will get in touch with you shortly.
publicContact.successDesc: Thank you for reaching out. A platform architect will reply to your registered email shortly.
